infringements.steward_decision_summary: 2026 CANADIAN GRAND PRIX 22 - 24 May 2026 The team representative is required to report to the Stewards at 18:00, in relation to the incident below: The Stewards From The Stewards To The Team Manager, Cadillac Formula 1 Team Document 68 Date 23 May 2026 Time 16:40 No / Driver 11 - Sergio Perez Reaso

raw_text_excerpt:
2026 CANADIAN GRAND PRIX
22 - 24 May 2026
The team representative is required to report to the Stewards at 18:00, in relation to the incident
below:
 
The Stewards
From The Stewards
To The Team Manager,
Cadillac Formula 1 Team
Document 68
Date 23 May 2026
Time 16:40
No / Driver 11 - Sergio Perez
Reason Alleged breach of Article 12.2.1.i of the International Sporting Code and non-
compliance with Race Director’s Competition Notes (item 1, document 6).
Garry Connelly Tanja Geilhausen
Pedro Lamy Marcel Demers
